                CHECK(confidence IN ('high', 'medium', 'low')),
                CHECK(outcome IN ('failure', 'success', 'workaround', 'pattern')),
                CHECK(rel_type IN ('dependsOn', 'synergyWith', 'batchWith', 'conflictsWith')),
                CHECK(status IN ('active', 'completed', 'aborted')),
                CHECK(status IN ('started', 'completed', 'failed', 'skipped')),
                CHECK(status IN ('todo', 'in_progress', 'done', 'blocked', 'skipped', 'irrelevant')),
                FROM learning_tags
                FROM learning_tags
                SELECT group_concat(tag, ' ')
                SELECT group_concat(tag, ' ')
                WHERE learning_id = NEW.learning_id
                WHERE learning_id = OLD.learning_id
            ), '')
            ), '')
            CHECK (id_lo < id_hi)
            INSERT INTO learnings_fts(learnings_fts, rowid, title, content, tags_text)
            INSERT INTO learnings_fts(learnings_fts, rowid, title, content, tags_text)
            INSERT INTO learnings_fts(rowid, title, content, tags_text)
            INSERT INTO learnings_fts(rowid, title, content, tags_text)
            PRIMARY KEY (id_lo, id_hi),
            SET tags_text = COALESCE((
            SET tags_text = COALESCE((
            UNIQUE(learning_id, tag)
            UNIQUE(old_learning_id, new_learning_id)
            UNIQUE(prd_id, file_path)
            UNIQUE(run_id, task_id, iteration)
            UNIQUE(task_id, file_path)
            UNIQUE(task_id, related_id, rel_type)
            UPDATE learnings
            UPDATE learnings
            VALUES ('delete', old.id, old.title, old.content, old.tags_text);
            VALUES ('delete', old.id, old.title, old.content, old.tags_text);
            VALUES (new.id, new.title, new.content, new.tags_text);
            VALUES (new.id, new.title, new.content, new.tags_text);
            WHERE id = NEW.learning_id;
            WHERE id = OLD.learning_id;
            acceptance_criteria TEXT,  -- JSON array stored as TEXT
            applies_to_errors TEXT,             -- JSON array of error patterns
            applies_to_files TEXT,              -- JSON array of file patterns
            applies_to_task_types TEXT,         -- JSON array of task type prefixes
            blocked_at_iteration INTEGER,  -- Global iteration when task was blocked (for decay)
            branch_name TEXT,
            completed_at TEXT,         -- When task was marked done
            confidence TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium'
            content TEXT NOT NULL,
            content,
            content=learnings,
            content_rowid=id
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            default_model TEXT
            description TEXT NOT NULL,
            description TEXT,
            description TEXT,
            dimensions INTEGER NOT NULL,
            duration_seconds INTEGER,
            embedding BLOB NOT NULL,
            ended_at TEXT,
            ended_at TEXT,
            error_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            external_git_repo TEXT,
            file_path TEXT NOT NULL,
            file_path TEXT NOT NULL,
            file_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(file_type IN ('prd', 'task_list', 'prompt')),
            global_acceptance_criteria TEXT,
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY CHECK(id = 1),  -- Only allow one row
            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
            id_hi INTEGER NOT NULL,
            id_lo INTEGER NOT NULL,
            imported_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            iteration INTEGER NOT NULL,
            iteration INTEGER NOT NULL,    -- Which iteration within the run
            iteration_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            iteration_counter INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            last_applied_at TEXT
            last_commit TEXT,              -- Most recent git commit hash
            last_error TEXT,           -- Most recent error message
            last_files TEXT,               -- JSON array of recently modified files
            last_run_id TEXT,                      -- Most recent run
            last_shown_at TEXT,
            last_task_id TEXT,                     -- Last selected task
            learning_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES learnings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            learning_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES learnings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            model TEXT NOT NULL,
            new_learning_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES learnings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            notes TEXT
            notes TEXT,
            notes TEXT, archived_at TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
            old_learning_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES learnings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            options TEXT NOT NULL,
            outcome TEXT NOT NULL
            prd_id INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 REFERENCES prd_metadata(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
            priority_philosophy TEXT,
            project TEXT NOT NULL,
            raw_json TEXT,
            reason TEXT,
            rel_type TEXT NOT NULL
            related_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            resolution TEXT,
            resolved_at TEXT,
            review_guidelines TEXT,
            review_scope TEXT,         -- JSON object stored as TEXT (optional)
            root_cause TEXT,                    -- What caused the issue (for failures)
            run_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES runs(run_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            run_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES runs(run_id),
            run_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
            run_id TEXT REFERENCES runs(run_id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
            severity TEXT,             -- For review tasks (optional)
            skipped_at_iteration INTEGER   -- Global iteration when task was skipped (for decay)
            solution TEXT,                      -- How it was resolved
            source_review TEXT,        -- For review tasks (optional)
            started_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            started_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            started_at TEXT,           -- When task was first claimed
            status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active'
            status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'resolved', 'deferred')),
            status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'started'
            status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'todo'
            tag TEXT NOT NULL,
            tags_text,
            task_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            task_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            task_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            task_id TEXT REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
            task_id TEXT REFERENCES tasks(id),
            task_prefix TEXT UNIQUE,
            times_applied INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            times_shown INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            title TEXT NOT NULL,
            title TEXT NOT NULL,
            title TEXT NOT NULL,
            title,
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
        )');
        );
        );
        );
        );
        );
        );
        );
        );
        , archived_at TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
        , archived_at TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
        , default_max_retries INTEGER);
        , model TEXT, difficulty TEXT, escalation_note TEXT, required_tests TEXT DEFAULT NULL, max_retries INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 3, consecutive_failures INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, archived_at TEXT DEFAULT NULL, requires_human INTEGER DEFAULT 0, human_review_timeout INTEGER DEFAULT NULL, claims_shared_infra INTEGER DEFAULT NULL);
        , schema_version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
        , window_shown INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, window_applied INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, window_start_iteration INTEGER, tags_text TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', retired_at TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
        END;
        END;
        END;
        END;
        END;
/* WARNING: Script requires that SQLITE_DBCONFIG_DEFENSIVE be disabled */
BEGIN TRANSACTION;
COMMIT;
CREATE INDEX idx_dedup_dismissals_hi ON dedup_dismissals(id_hi);
CREATE INDEX idx_key_decisions_archived_at ON key_decisions(archived_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_key_decisions_run_id ON key_decisions(run_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_key_decisions_status ON key_decisions(status);
CREATE INDEX idx_learning_embeddings_model ON learning_embeddings(model);
CREATE INDEX idx_learning_tags_learning_id ON learning_tags(learning_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_learning_tags_tag ON learning_tags(tag);
CREATE INDEX idx_learnings_created_at ON learnings(created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_learnings_outcome ON learnings(outcome);
CREATE INDEX idx_learnings_run_id ON learnings(run_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_learnings_task_id ON learnings(task_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_prd_files_prd_id ON prd_files(prd_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_run_tasks_archived_at ON run_tasks(archived_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_run_tasks_run_id ON run_tasks(run_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_run_tasks_task_id ON run_tasks(task_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_runs_archived_at ON runs(archived_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_runs_status ON runs(status);
CREATE INDEX idx_supersessions_new ON learning_supersessions(new_learning_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_supersessions_old ON learning_supersessions(old_learning_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_task_files_file_path ON task_files(file_path);
CREATE INDEX idx_task_files_task_id ON task_files(task_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_task_relationships_rel_type ON task_relationships(rel_type);
CREATE INDEX idx_task_relationships_related_id ON task_relationships(related_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_task_relationships_task_id ON task_relationships(task_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_task_relationships_type_taskid ON task_relationships(rel_type, task_id, related_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_archived_at ON tasks(archived_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_priority ON tasks(priority);
CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_status ON tasks(status);
CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_status_priority ON tasks(status, priority);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "prd_metadata" (
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS 'learnings_fts_config'(k PRIMARY KEY, v) WITHOUT ROWID;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS 'learnings_fts_data'(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, block BLOB);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS 'learnings_fts_docsize'(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, sz BLOB);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS 'learnings_fts_idx'(segid, term, pgno, PRIMARY KEY(segid, term)) WITHOUT ROWID;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sqlite_sequence(name,seq);
CREATE TABLE dedup_dismissals (
CREATE TABLE global_state (
CREATE TABLE key_decisions (
CREATE TABLE learning_embeddings (
CREATE TABLE learning_supersessions (
CREATE TABLE learning_tags (
CREATE TABLE learnings (
CREATE TABLE prd_files (
CREATE TABLE run_tasks (
CREATE TABLE runs (
CREATE TABLE task_files (
CREATE TABLE task_relationships (
CREATE TABLE tasks (
CREATE TRIGGER learning_tags_ad AFTER DELETE ON learning_tags BEGIN
CREATE TRIGGER learning_tags_ai AFTER INSERT ON learning_tags BEGIN
CREATE TRIGGER learnings_ad AFTER DELETE ON learnings BEGIN
CREATE TRIGGER learnings_ai AFTER INSERT ON learnings BEGIN
CREATE TRIGGER learnings_au AFTER UPDATE ON learnings BEGIN
DELETE FROM sqlite_sequence;
INSERT INTO global_state VALUES(1,0,NULL,NULL,'TIMESTAMP','TIMESTAMP',19);
INSERT INTO learnings_fts_config VALUES('version',4);
INSERT INTO learnings_fts_data VALUES(1,x'');
INSERT INTO learnings_fts_data VALUES(10,x'00000000000000');

INSERT INTO prd_files VALUES(6,1,'<WORK>','prompt');
INSERT INTO prd_metadata VALUES(1,'carve-baseline-wave','carve-baseline/wave','2-slot wave dogfood scenario for the engine.rs carve. Four independent tasks (no inter-deps, disjoint touchesFiles) so the loop fills both parallel slots per wave. Exercises run_wave_iteration + ensure_slot_worktrees (slot-0 path threading, defense layer #1) + run_slot_iteration + process_slot_result + merge-back.','{"description":"Parallel","hierarchy":["1. Independent"]}','{"criteria":["All tasks complete across waves"],"description":"All pass"}','{"priorityGuidelines":{"critical":"1-10"}}',unistr('{\u000a  "branchName": "carve-baseline/wave",\u000a  "description": "2-slot wave dogfood scenario for the engine.rs carve. Four independent tasks (no inter-deps, disjoint touchesFiles) so the loop fills both parallel slots per wave.
